title: The Mischief Moles and the Kingdom of the Ants
summary: Elliot the Elephant has lost his precious gemstones, prompting the expert mystery solvers, Disco and Visco the Mischief Moles, to spring into action. Digging deep beneath the earth, the duo navigates through dark caves and treacherous mud until they stumble upon a bustling underground civilization: the Kingdom of the Ants and Worms. With the help of some unexpected friends and their magical Mousketools, the moles delve even deeper to uncover a mysterious wooden box. Inside, they find the radiant treasure and return it to their grateful elephant friend, proving no mystery is too deep for the Mischief Moles.

highlightQuote.text: There's a surprise tool that can help you later.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let's tell a story about the Mischief Moles find the missing gem of Elliot the elephant.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yes, and the Mischief Moles had already gathered all of their digging equipment.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And are you in the entrance to the cave?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they're in the entrance to the cave. And Elliot the elephant says, "I think it might be in this cave, but buried under the ground." And the moles said, "Well, you came to the right mischievous mystery solvers, that's us, Disco and Visco." And so, what did they do first?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dig.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Dig, dig, dig, dig, dig. But then Disco said, "We're digging, but it's too dark. We forgot something."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We got to switch on our headlamps.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Click, click. Disco and Visco switched on their headlamps, and then they could see in the dark. And then, as they dug a tunnel at the back of the cave, deeper and deeper down into the ground, they started to notice something funny.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The ground was getting mucky. They were digging into deep, mucky mud. So what did they have to do now?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They had to dig some place else.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Disco said, "Yeah, I don't think the gem is in this mucky mud. We must have made a wrong turn somewhere." And Visco said, "Okay, let's back up." And so they went back up the tunnel and dug in a different direction.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: So, you had been digging at the left, I want you to dig at the right.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so instead of digging to the left, they dug to the right. Dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig. And suddenly, there was a click as Disco's claw, instead of digging into dirt, it smacked against something hard. And what was it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Keep telling the story and then you'll find out.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Disco said, "Oh my gosh, maybe it's the gemstone." But Visco looked over and said, "No, it's just a rock." But Disco picked up the thing and said, "Wait a minute, it's not the gemstone or a rock. It's..." What was it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Keep telling the story, then you'll find out.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was a little toy car! And Disco said, "Huh, this isn't a gemstone. What's it doing deep underground?" And Visco said, "I don't know, let's keep it though. Looks like a nice little car." And Disco said, "Okay, we've got to keep digging." And so, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig. They dug and dug and dug until suddenly, poof! Disco put his claw right through a wall of dirt into the open air. And Visco said, "What happened? You stopped." And Disco said, "I think, I think I found an empty chamber deep under the ground. It's all dark." And Visco said, "Oh, just point your headlamp in there." And Disco looked inside, and it was a big chamber full of... Who lived there? It was some kind of creature, maybe.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ants and worms.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ants and worms! It was a big city deep underground where ants live and worms live. It was the Kingdom of the Ants, and the worms were their friends. They also lived there. But the ants were the smart ones that built little buildings and they scurried all around. And Disco and Visco looked into the entrance to this chamber from the little tunnel they had dug into the huge space, and they were amazed because there were millions of ants running this way and that way along the floor and the walls and the ceiling.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And there was, and there was worms wiggling about.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: There was worms wiggling about. And the ants were building little buildings everywhere and tending to their eggs and growing new baby babies and storing their food, and the worms were wriggling through the dirt in the floor. And they said, "Look what we found, a whole world under the ground where the ants and worms live." And Disco said, "Um, but we didn't find the mystery gem yet." But Visco said, "Yeah, but maybe they'll know." And so he said, "Huh, how could we find out? What do you think they could try?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: How about one of the Mystery Mousketools would help you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: One of the what?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The Mystery Mousketools.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mousketools? What's that mean?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That means that we can use one of their tools.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, like what?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There's a surprise tool that can help you later.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A surprise tool that can help you later. Maybe it's a special...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, we can find out in the show with Mickey and Minnie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, in the show with Mickey and Minnie. But this is the Mischief Moles story. And they found...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ding dong! Who's there? Did I hear you say Mystery Mousketool?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Uh, yes, said Disco and Visco. Who, who is it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's just Mickey and Minnie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, hi Mickey and Minnie. What are you doing here?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We're just trying to see if you need a Mystery Mousketool.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, we do because we just found the Kingdom of the Ants and Worms and we need to ask them about the missing gem.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: So here's some stairs and one shovel.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, thanks. What do we do with those?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And a lamp. Those are the things that you need to go under with.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, to go underground? Are you saying the gem might be buried even deeper than the Kingdom of the Ants and Worms?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Let's try it. Because if there's anything we moles do best, it's digging. Thanks, Mousketeers! And Disco and Visco went digging right down straight through the ground below the Kingdom of the ants and the worms, and they went dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig, dig. And finally, clonk! The shovel bonked against something hard and made of wood. It wasn't a gemstone, but Disco started to scrape the dirt off it. And Visco said, "What's that? It seems to be big and rectangular." And Disco said, "I think it's..."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I think it's one of my puzzle pieces.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A puzzle piece? No, it's bigger than a puzzle piece would be. It's almost as big as me, said Disco. And he started to tug on it, and it came out of the dirt. And Disco said, "Wow, it's a big box! How are we going to open it?" And Visco said, "Well, it's got a lid..."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh! Those, we colored in the, your Mystery Mousketools, so, and another Mystery Mousketool is scissors. Here you go.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Scissors? What do we do with those?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We cut to open the box.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! And Disco went cut, cut, cut, cut, cut. And he cut through the side of the box to open it right up. And he lifted the top. And suddenly, when he pointed his headlamp down into the box, the whole tunnel that they were in was sparkling with colored light in red and purple and yellow. And Visco said, "Oh my gosh, what's in there?" And Disco said, "I think it's the gemstones." Because everything was sparkling as the light shining from his headlamp bounced off the beautiful shining gemstones that were inside the box. And Disco said, "I think we did it! We found them!" And Visco said, "Hooray!"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [Claps]

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so, they gathered up the gemstones and they brought them back up past the Kingdom of the Ants and the Worms, up the tunnel through the muck, out the deep dark cave and back to the elephant who said...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [Elephant trumpeting sound]

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what did that mean in elephant language?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That meant, "Thank you!"

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Disco and Visco said, "Oh, it's all in a day's work for us Mischief Moles." And that's the end of the story.

characters.name: Disco
characters.description: An energetic Mischief Mole and superhero-clad detective, Disco is one of two identical twins who embark on grand adventures through the deep. Alongside her sister Thisco, this architect of the subterranean maps hidden realms—from frozen frontiers to the dusty canyons beneath the furniture—by piloting her signature submarine or racing toy cars through the bedroom's wild heights. Guided by "Cornebyborn" dances and Papa Mole’s lore, she finds solace within her glowing basket house, a dream sanctuary and fortress of a hundred locks. Whether navigating grimy domestic landscapes or open waters, Disco balances mechanical ingenuity with a persistent, soft-hearted wonder for the night sky.

characters.name: Visco
characters.description: A mole detective and partner to Disco.

characters.name: Elliot the Elephant
characters.description: An elephant who lost his precious gemstones.

characters.name: Mickey
characters.description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

characters.name: Minnie
characters.description: A wise veteran of briny depths and interstellar frontiers, Mickey’s resourceful mouse companion and confidant to the Princess of Mouseland guides Izzy and Hattie with a glowing lantern and ingenious Mystery Mousketools. Having recently breathed life into a towering guardian of interlocking bricks, this intrepid traveler now points the way toward the mountain’s peak, pausing to investigate the savory aroma of bacon-scented mushrooms while serving as a compassionate friend whose seasoned instincts help decipher Frasgle’s complex roars and sounds.

places.name: Cave Entrance
places.description: The starting point of the search for the missing gems.

places.name: Mucky Mud Tunnel
places.description: A deep, underground passage that leads to a dead end.

places.name: Kingdom of the Ants
places.description: A massive, bustling underground city where ants build buildings and worms wiggle through the dirt.

places.name: Worms
places.description: A massive, bustling underground city where ants build buildings and worms wiggle through the dirt.
